testcase.name: acquisitionVideo.generate — happy path > calls VideoAgent(mode=acquisition), writes history agentMode=acquisition, ctaScript contains CTA keyword
acquisitionVideo.generate — zod validation > conversionGoal 留空 → BAD_REQUEST (转化目标必填)
acquisitionVideo.generate — zod validation > sourceCopy 长度 10 (min boundary) → pass
acquisitionVideo.generate — zod validation > sourceCopy 长度 3000 (max boundary) → pass
acquisitionVideo.generate — zod validation > sourceCopy 长度 3001 → BAD_REQUEST
acquisitionVideo.generate — fallback path (Specialist internal error) > agent returns isFallback=true → history written with isFallback=true
acquisitionVideo.generate — cross-account RLS isolation > findFirst returns null (accountId mismatch blocked by RLS) → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR

US-005 AC-8: acquisitionVideo.generate integration — nock Anthropic SDK + real DB > generate: nock intercepts Anthropic call, writes history + cost_log to real DB, ctaScript contains CTA keyword, < 5s
